summary: Comprehensive diagnostic matrix for Linux kernel lockup scenarios covering hard/soft lockups, timer discrepancies, spinlock deadlocks, race conditions, memory pressure, hardware errors, and third-party module issues.

matrix.trigger: Watchdog detected hard LOCKUP on cpu {N}
matrix.arg_hints: N: CPU number from lockup message
matrix.why: Examine what's running on the locked CPU

matrix.trigger: exception RIP: _spin_lock_irqsave+50 or _raw_spin_lock_irqsave+0x26
matrix.arg_hints: addr: from RDI register in backtrace
matrix.expect: Spinlock raw_lock value and waiter count

matrix.trigger: Task looping in spinlock in kernel mode for >60 seconds
matrix.why: Find tasks in uninterruptible sleep state
matrix.expect: Tasks stuck in I/O wait on specific CPU

matrix.trigger: tvec_base values way behind current jiffies on all CPUs
matrix.action: p tvec_bases:a | awk '{print "struct tvec_base.timer_jiffies " $9}' >tjiffies; < tjiffies | paste - - | awk '{print NR "\t" $0 "\n"}' | awk '{if($NF<{current_jiffies}){print}}' | awk '$0!=""' | awk '{print $0 "\t" {current_jiffies}-$NF " behind"}'
matrix.why: Compare timer jiffies across all CPUs
matrix.expect: Timer jiffies lag behind current jiffies

matrix.trigger: Multiple tasks stuck in I/O wait on {device}
matrix.arg_hints: device: logical volume name from symptoms
matrix.why: Check logical volume status and mapping

matrix.trigger: Active SCSI commands with negative deadlines
exception RIP: mwait_idle_with_hints+196
CPU idle state detected
matrix.arg_hints: cpu: CPU number from tvec_base association
matrix.expect: CPU idle state and stack trace

matrix.trigger: hrtimer pointer found in stack
matrix.arg_hints: addr: hrtimer pointer from stack analysis

matrix.trigger: exception RIP: generic_exec_single+0xfa
matrix.why: Check why IPI not handled on CPU 1
matrix.expect: CPU 1 stuck in perf_event_wakeup() with interrupts disabled

matrix.trigger: exception RIP: __wake_up+0x49
matrix.why: Find panic location in wake_up function
matrix.expect: Panic at pop %r14 instruction after spin_unlock_irqrestore

matrix.trigger: perf_event_wakeup+0x45 exception
matrix.expect: irq_work at offset showing next and func pointers

matrix.trigger: ring_buffer.event_list empty
matrix.arg_hints: addr: from context or previous analysis
matrix.why: Examine ring buffer event list status

matrix.trigger: wait_queue_head_t lock counter=0x1
Soft lockup messages with RIP: native_queued_spin_lock_slowpath+0x122/0x200
matrix.arg_hints: addr: from RDI register in backtrace
matrix.why: Identify spinlock CPU is stuck on

matrix.trigger: rcu_sched CPU stalls detected on multiple CPUs
Massive calls to shrink_slab() -> prune_super() -> prune_dcache_sb()
matrix.action: kmem -s | awk 'NR>1{printf($1 "\t" $NF "\t %8.3f MiB\n", $2*$4/2**20)}' | sort -k3nr | column -t | head
matrix.why: List slab caches sorted by size
matrix.expect: dentry cache using large amount of memory

matrix.trigger: dentry cache using >100 GiB
negative_dentry_limit = 0
mce: [Hardware Error]: Machine check events logged
matrix.why: Check kernel log for all messages

matrix.trigger: CMCI storm detected: switching to poll mode
Zone 'Normal' lock contention
WARNING: CPU: {N} PID: {PID} at include/linux/kref.h:52 fl2000_device_probe+0x304/0x3e0 [fl2000]
matrix.why: Examine SCSI device associated with timed-out command

matrix.trigger: SCSI command older than its timeout
matrix.expect: WARNING about EH or stalled queue

matrix.trigger: Spinlock val.counter = {value} (not typical pattern)
matrix.expect: Binary representation showing unusual bit pattern

matrix.trigger: rcu_sched detected stalls on CPUs/tasks: {N}
matrix.arg_hints: N: CPU number from stall message
matrix.expect: vsapiapp stuck at kvm_lock_spinning and ioctlMod

matrix.trigger: Tasks stuck in TASK_UNINTERRUPTIBLE state for >120 seconds
matrix.expect: Multiple tasks in UN state for >2 minutes

matrix.trigger: vsapiapp stuck at kvm_lock_spinning
matrix.arg_hints: cpu: CPU where vsapiapp is running

matrix.trigger: kthreadd stuck in schedule
matrix.arg_hints: cpu: CPU where kthreadd should run

matrix.trigger: Tasks waiting for page writeback completion
matrix.why: Examine memory page for writeback status

matrix.trigger: sys_close replaced with closeHook
matrix.why: Check system call table for modifications
matrix.expect: sys_close replaced with closeHook at syscall 3

matrix.trigger: kworker waiting at wait_for_completion in kthread_create_on_node
Multiple hard lockups on unrelated CPUs with different code paths
matrix.action: bt -a | grep "exception RIP:" | sort | uniq -c | sort -k1nr
matrix.why: Count exception RIP occurrences across all CPUs

matrix.trigger: Timer jiffies lag >10 seconds behind current jiffies on all CPUs except one
matrix.why: Check which CPU owns specific tvec_base

matrix.trigger: dentry cache using >700 GiB with negative_dentry_limit = 0
matrix.action: kmem -s dentry | awk 'NR>1{printf($1 "\t" $NF "\t %8.3f GiB\n", $2*$4/2**30)}' | sort -k3nr | column -t | head
matrix.why: Check dentry cache size in GiB

matrix.trigger: MCE events logged for >90 days before lockups
Spinlock value shows illegal pattern (not a valid spinlock)
matrix.why: Check kernel memory allocation for spinlock address
matrix.expect: Memory from different cache/zone than expected

matrix.trigger: vsapiapp blocking kthreadd on same CPU with spinlock contention
matrix.expect: Spinlock with head/tail values showing contention
